attributes.description: An accessible label for the navigation landmark. Customize for multiple paginations on a page.
attributes.name: aria-label

attributes.description:
The current page number. The default value is 1.
The component will emit a `syn-pagination-page-changed` event whenever the page changes, allowing you to respond to page changes in your application.
attributes.name: current-page

attributes.description: When true, the pagination controls are disabled and non-interactive.
attributes.name: disabled

attributes.description: When true, a divider is displayed at the top of the pagination component.
attributes.name: divider

attributes.description:
The number of items to display per page. The default value is 25.
The component will emit a `syn-pagination-page-size-changed` event whenever the page size changes, allowing you to respond to page size changes in your application.
attributes.name: page-size

attributes.description:
An array of numbers representing the available options for the number of items to display per page. The default value is [10, 25, 50, 100].
The component will use this array to populate the rows-per-page selector, allowing users to choose from the specified options.
attributes.name: page-size-options

attributes.description: The size of the pagination controls.
attributes.name: size

attributes.description: Total amount of items. The component will use this value to calculate the total number of pages based on the selected rows per page.
attributes.name: total-items

attributes.description:
The pagination variant to use. The "full" variant includes comprehensive controls for navigating between pages and adjusting the number of displayed rows,
while the "compact" variant offers a streamlined interface with essential navigation controls.
The default value is "full".
attributes.name: variant

cssParts.description: The divider element displayed at the top of the pagination component.
cssParts.name: divider

cssParts.description: The individual navigation action buttons (first, previous, next, last).
cssParts.name: navigation-action

cssParts.description: The section containing the page number input and total pages display.
cssParts.name: page-input-section

cssParts.description: The text element displaying the current page item range and total items.
cssParts.name: page-item-summary

cssParts.description: The wrapper element containing the page size select and page item summary.
cssParts.name: page-size-select-wrapper

events.description: Emitted when the current page changes
events.name: syn-pagination-page-changed

events.description: Emitted when the page size changes
events.name: syn-pagination-page-size-changed

properties.name: ariaLabel

The current page number. The default value is 1.
The component will emit a `syn-pagination-page-changed` event whenever the page changes, allowing you to respond to page changes in your application.

The number of items to display per page. The default value is 25.

An array of numbers representing the available options for the number of items to display per page. The default value is [10, 25, 50, 100].

properties.name: pageSizeOptions

properties.name: totalItems

The pagination variant to use. The "full" variant includes comprehensive controls for navigating between pages and adjusting the number of displayed rows,
while the "compact" variant offers a streamlined interface with essential navigation controls.
The default value is "full".
properties.name: variant

summary: <syn-pagination /> provides page navigation, direct page input, and page-size selection for large data sets.
